# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: web-http
  namespace: web
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: web-http-from-ingress
  namespace: web
spec:
  server:
    name: web-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress
          namespace: ingress
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: web-http-from-frontend
  namespace: web
spec:
  server:
    name: web-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-http-from-web
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: web
          namespace: web
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-grpc
  namespace: api
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-grpc-from-frontend
  namespace: api
spec:
  server:
    name: api-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend
---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-grpc-from-web
  namespace: api
spec:
  server:
    name: api-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: web
          namespace: web
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-metrics
  namespace: api
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  port: metrics
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-metrics-from-prometheus
  namespace: api
spec:
  server:
    name: api-metrics
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
---

        - name: api
          namespace: api

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: postgres-tcp
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: postgres
  port: postgres
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: postgres-tcp-from-api
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: postgres-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: api
---

  name: postgres-tcp-from-orders
  namespace: data

  server:
    name: postgres-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders
---

  namespace: observability
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: jaeger-collector
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: jaeger-collector-grpc-from-api
  namespace: observability
spec:
  server:
    name: jaeger-collector-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: api
---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: jaeger-collector-grpc-from-frontend
  namespace: observability
spec:
  server:
    name: jaeger-collector-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend
---

  namespace: observability

  server:
    name: jaeger-collector-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: web
          namespace: web
---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: prometheus-scrape
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: prometheus
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: prometheus-scrape-from-grafana
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  server:
    name: prometheus-scrape
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: grafana
          namespace: monitoring
